description: Patch: update workflow.md as a whole runtime template during trellis update.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(update): update `.trellis/workflow.md` as a whole hash-tracked template so runtime phase routing markers, including Codex `codex-inline` / `codex-sub-agent` blocks, refresh during `trellis update`.
notes: Run `trellis update` to refresh hash-tracked workflow templates. No migration required.
